objects.name: answers
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE answers (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                task_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                answer_label TEXT,
                content_html TEXT NOT NULL,
                content_text TEXT,
                is_valid BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                display_order INTEGER NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            )

constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

objects.name: images
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE images (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                filename TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                file_data BLOB NOT NULL,
                mime_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                file_size INTEGER NOT NULL,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: task_images
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE task_images (
                task_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                image_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                context TEXT NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (task_id, image_id, context),
                FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                FOREIGN KEY (image_id) REFERENCES images(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            )

constraints.definition: FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
FOREIGN KEY (image_id) REFERENCES images(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

objects.name: tasks
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE tasks (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                external_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                date_created TEXT,
                subject TEXT NOT NULL,
                class_level INTEGER,
                difficulty TEXT,
                task_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                scope TEXT,
                topic TEXT,
                points INTEGER,
                time_minutes INTEGER,
                source TEXT,
                content_html TEXT NOT NULL,
                content_text TEXT,
                twin_task_id INTEGER,
                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
                FOREIGN KEY (twin_task_id) REFERENCES tasks(id)
            )
